name: atomicmemory
description: AtomicMemory MCP server, exposes memory_search, memory_ingest, memory_package, and memory_list over stdio MCP. The server is published as @atomicmemory/mcp-server and is intended to be launched by agent hosts with npx.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Semantic retrieval against AtomicMemory. Use before answering questions that reference past work or prior decisions.

tools.name: memory_ingest
tools.description: AUDN-mutating ingest (mode: text or messages) or deterministic verbatim ingest (mode: verbatim). Saves durable facts, preferences, decisions.

tools.name: memory_package
tools.description: Token-budgeted curated context package. Use when broad context matters more than a single fact lookup.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: Recent scoped-memory listing. Use when the user asks what memory records exist for a configured scope.

env.name: ATOMICMEMORY_API_URL
env.description: URL of the memory backend. Defaults to local AtomicMemory core at http://127.0.0.1:3050 for provider=atomicmemory; required for mem0.

env.name: ATOMICMEMORY_API_KEY
env.description: Optional bearer credential forwarded to providers that require HTTP authorization.

env.name: ATOMICMEMORY_SCOPE_USER
env.description: User scope for the MCP session.

env.name: ATOMICMEMORY_SCOPE_NAMESPACE
env.description: Namespace/workspace scope for the MCP session.

env.name: ATOMICMEMORY_SCOPE_AGENT
env.description: Agent scope for the MCP session.
